days.title: What is a Product Manager?
days.teamContext: You're shadowing a PM on their first sprint planning session.

tasks.title: Search: Find 2 PM job descriptions and note recurring keywords
Activity: Write a 3-sentence answer to 'What does a PM do?'
Bonus: Watch Shreyas Doshi's PM archetypes thread

assessmentTask.rawMaterial: Use your 3-sentence answer from the activity.
assessmentTask.claudePrompt: Evaluate this APM's understanding of the PM role. Be specific about gaps.

days.title: Discovery & Problem Framing
days.teamContext: Your PM asks you to help frame a discovery brief for a new feature.

tasks.title: Search: Find a real product that uses JTBD framing in their messaging
Activity: Write a JTBD statement for a product you use daily

assessmentTask.rawMaterial: Your JTBD statement from the activity.
assessmentTask.outputFormat: Critical review of your JTBD statement
assessmentTask.claudePrompt: Critique this JTBD statement. Is the job specific enough? Is the outcome measurable?
